ksa_text: Build data visualizations, dashboards, and performance reports that accurately represent analytical findings, support self-service exploration, and meet defined consumer requirements for content, layout, and refresh frequency.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.412) to justify inclusion for the Director of Master Data Management. Without stronger framework alignment, this task KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain task KSA be expected in real-world Director of Master Data Management roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for Director of Master Data Management roles increasingly include Applied Analytics & BI competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for Director of Master Data Management now include Applied Analytics & BI competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Applied Analytics & BI task KSA is relevant to the Director of Master Data Management based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
